visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in an oversized white shirt with short brown hair stands behind a wooden table in an indoor room with light-colored walls. He holds a blue-and-white checkered flag and waves it energetically. On the table is a small green potted plant and a toy dinosaur. (2) The scene cuts to a closer shot of the man speaking with animated facial expressions and hand gestures. Framed Japanese-style artwork hangs on the wall behind him. (3) A second person, seen from the back wearing a white shirt and a black backpack, enters the frame. The main character points at him while speaking aggressively. (4) The camera zooms in on the main character's face as he continues to speak with high energy, his eyes wide and eyebrows raised. (5) The main character gestures towards a circular space between his hands as if holding an invisible object. (6) A series of close-up shots of the main character against a white background, holding the blue-and-white flag and pointing directly at the camera with intense expressions. (7) The video ends with a series of graphic slides containing black text on white and light blue backgrounds with government-style logos.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來注意哦. [Logo]: 廣告. (2) [Subtitle]: 注意哦,注意哦,我們要入境哦. (3) [Subtitle]: 入境不能帶電子煙哦. [Variety]: (類菸品) [Slogan]: 入境不能帶電子煙哦. (4) [Subtitle]: 帶電子煙入境是要罰五萬哦. [Variety]: (類菸品) [Slogan]: 帶電子煙入境要罰五萬. (5) [Subtitle]: 你這個就是... [Slogan]: 電子煙哦:) (類菸品). (6) [Subtitle]: 不行啊,國外帶也不行啊,就是要把五萬啊. [Slogan]: 不行啊. 國外帶也不行啊. (7) [Subtitle]: 今天剛好有優惠活動啊. (8) [Subtitle]: 你只要把這支電子煙丟到我這個圈圈裡面. [Variety]: (類菸品). (9) [Subtitle]: 罰金就給你打五折. [Slogan]: 罰金就給你打五折. (10) [Subtitle]: 電子煙都罰5萬. [Variety]: (類菸品). (11) [Subtitle]: 沒錯,現在不管是電子煙. [Variety]: (類菸品). (12) [Subtitle]: 加熱菸都是違法的. [Slogan]: 加熱菸 都是違法的. (13) [Subtitle]: 新臺幣2千到1萬元罰鍰. [Slogan]: 新臺幣2千到1萬元罰鍰. (14) [Subtitle]: 不能攜帶入境. [Slogan]: 不能攜帶入境. (15) [Subtitle]: 通通都違法. [Slogan]: 通通都違法. (16) [Subtitle]: 5萬到500萬元的罰鍰. [Slogan]: 新臺幣5萬到500萬元的罰鍰. (17) [Subtitle]: 5千萬元的罰鍰. [Slogan]: 新臺幣5千萬元的罰鍰. (18) [Subtitle]: 沒有任何商量. [Slogan]: 沒有任何商量 討價還價 殺價空間 優惠空間 都沒有. (19) [Logo]: 衛生福利部 國民健康署. 新竹市衛生局 關心您.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 1 person seen from the back acting as a traveler.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in his 30s with short styled brown hair, wearing a plain white oversized t-shirt, often displaying very exaggerated and comedic facial expressions.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with cream-colored walls, featuring framed artwork of traditional Japanese style (waves and Fuji), a wooden-textured table with a small green artificial plant, and later a plain white studio background for graphic presentation.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched 'Ding' SFX marks the start. A male voice speaks rapidly and energetically in Mandarin with high pitch variability. An upbeat electronic BGM with a strong percussive beat starts immediately. (2) Frequent 'Whoosh' SFX occur between rapid edits in the vocal track. The speaker's tone is exaggerated and comedic. (3) A sharp 'Smack' or 'Impact' SFX sounds as if an object is being hit, followed by a comedic 'Boo' or sliding tone SFX. (4) The speech rate remains high and dense, with multiple layers of cartoonish sound effects (pops, dings) synchronized with visual emphasis. (5) The music continues at a steady fast tempo while the speaker shouts with high arousal. (6) A final ringing SFX concludes the audio track as the voice stops.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A public service announcement presented in a comedic and energetic short-video style to inform travelers that carrying electronic cigarettes or heated tobacco products into Taiwan is illegal and subject to heavy fines. It uses a popular social media creator to engage the audience with humorous delivery and exaggerated editing while conveying serious legal warnings from the Ministry of Health and Welfare and Hsinchu City Health Bureau.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear government logos and informational text regarding health regulations.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy comedic PSA focusing on tobacco regulations in Taiwan, characterized by rapid-fire editing and dense text overlays.
